name: Zucchini Country-Woman Style
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons grated cheese (I use a lot more)
2 eggs (can be replaced with soy flour and milk or omitted)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the zucchini into small rods.
2. Steam the zucchini until done.
3. In a separate pan, heat the butter. Add flour and stir until smooth.
4. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly, and cook until thickened.
5. Stir in cheese, Rahm, and egg yolk (or soy flour and milk). Beat the egg white until stiff and fold it in. Season with salt, pepper, and nutmeg to taste.
6. Mix the sauce with the cooked zucchini.
7. Pour the mixture into an oven-safe pan.
8. Sprinkle bread crumbs over the top of the zucchini mass.
9. Drizzle with olive oil.
10. Bake at medium heat for 15-20 minutes.
() You can also sprinkle grated cheese on the zucchini mass first, then add the bread crumbs, or vice versa, depending on your preference.
